extortion.description: CSaaS offers custom hosted software solutions and managed IT services, focusing on delivering quality Net-Native technology solutions tailored to individual clients. With nearly 30 years of experience, they provide support for businesses with complex IT needs through managed IT services, remote backups, and more. Their offerings include software solutions for event management, CRM, data tracking, and telecom services. As a Microsoft Silver Independent Software Vendor, CSaaS prides itself on developing custom applications and innovative IT solutions that help businesses operate faster and more securely. Employees: 25 Revenue:$5 Million Industry:Software Phone Number:(864) 248-4957
